brief_summary: Choose accurate section title. Best options, from most practical to most powerful: **1. Hotkeys** Best for transforms you use constantly. Examples: - `cmd+alt+1` → Numbered list - `cmd+alt+-` → Bullet list - `cmd+alt+,` → CSV - `cmd+alt+t` → Wrap in `Tabs` - `cmd+alt+b` → Wrap...
